parsed.reason: The answer faithfully captures and expands on the reference guidance: it explicitly recommends giving a warning before transition (5-10 min advance notice with concrete markers), names the feeling ("leaving is sad," acknowledges emotions are "huge"), and frames meltdowns as typical developmental behavior at this age.
